---
title: "Lesson 4: General Confidence Intervals"
subtitle: "Statistical Estimation for Data Science and AI"
---


::: {.column-margin}
{{< video 01_who-needs-normality.mp4 >}}

[Transcript](01_who-needs-normality.en.txt)
[Handout](02_video-slides-for-who-needs-normality_module5_lesson4.pdf){width=700 height=980}
:::

## Slides

## Reflection
